name: @artwork/cqrs
description: Standalone CQRS, DDD and outbox primitives.

scripts.lint: biome lint src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json README.md
scripts.format: biome format --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json README.md
scripts.check: biome check src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json README.md
scripts.validate: bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.prepack: bun run validate && bun run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run validate && bun run build
